table-user-id.name: Table User
table-user-id.hint: The user account that drives the shared TV. Must be Player role. Enter the user ID (a 16-character string).

fit-mode.name: Default Scene Fit Mode
fit-mode.hint: How scenes should fit the Table screen by default. Per-scene override available in Scene Config.

custom-scale.name: Custom Scale Override
custom-scale.hint: Force this zoom level instead of computing one. 1.0 = native. Set 0 to disable.

highlight-enabled.name: Show Active-Turn Highlight
highlight-enabled.hint: Draw a glowing ring under the active combatant on this client.

highlight-style.name: Active-Turn Highlight Style
highlight-style.hint: Visual style for the active-turn highlight.

highlight-use-disposition.name: Color Highlight by Disposition
highlight-use-disposition.hint: Friendly/neutral/hostile use different ring colors. Disable for a single neutral color.

table-mode.name: Table Mode
table-mode.hint: play = UI hidden + canvas locked. setup = UI visible + canvas pannable.

suppress-table-chat.name: Suppress Chat Input on Table
suppress-table-chat.hint: Hide the chat input on the Table client so spectators can't type.

auto-grant-ownership.name: Auto-grant OWNER on PCs
auto-grant-ownership.hint: Automatically grant the Table user OWNER on every player-owned actor. Required for the Table to drag tokens.

popup-backdrop.name: Dim Canvas Behind Pop-ups
popup-backdrop.hint: Darken the rest of the canvas when a journal/item/portrait pop-up is open on the Table.

toggle-table-mode.name: Toggle Table Mode
toggle-table-mode.hint: Flip the Table client between play (UI hidden, canvas locked) and setup (UI visible, canvas unlocked).

close-all-popups.name: Close All Table Pop-ups
close-all-popups.hint: Close every pop-up open on the Table client.

errors.no-observer-actors: The configured Table user has no actors with OBSERVER or OWNER permission. Vision will not work until permissions are granted.

warnings.no-table-user-online: Configured Table user is not currently logged in.
